dashboard.label: Interface Drop Monitoring Dashboard
dashboard.description: Real-time monitoring of packet drop increments across network devices - Data retained for 14 days

panel.title: Devices with Interface Counters Drop Data Stored in Dashboard

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="interface" | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen" by device_name | sort device_name | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")

index=main analyzer_type="interface" | sort 0 _time device_name interface_name | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx by device_name, interface_name | eval rx_increment = rx_drops - prev_rx, tx_increment = tx_drops - prev_tx | eval total_increment = coalesce(rx_increment,0) + coalesce(tx_increment,0) | where total_increment > 0 | stats dc(eval(device_name + ":" + interface_name)) as interfaces_with_new_drops

index=main analyzer_type="interface" | sort 0 _time device_name interface_name | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx by device_name, interface_name | eval rx_increment = rx_drops - prev_rx, tx_increment = tx_drops - prev_tx | eval total_increment = coalesce(rx_increment,0) + coalesce(tx_increment,0) | where total_increment > 0 | stats sum(total_increment) as new_drops by device_name | sort -new_drops

index=main analyzer_type="interface" | sort 0 _time device_name interface_name | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx by device_name, interface_name | eval rx_increment = coalesce(rx_drops - prev_rx, 0), tx_increment = coalesce(tx_drops - prev_tx, 0) | where rx_increment >= 0 AND tx_increment >= 0 | timechart span=5m sum(rx_increment) as "RX Drop Increments", sum(tx_increment) as "TX Drop Increments"

index=main analyzer_type="interface" | eval device_interface = device_name + ":" + interface_name | sort 0 _time device_interface | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx by device_interface | eval rx_increment = coalesce(rx_drops - prev_rx, 0), tx_increment = coalesce(tx_drops - prev_tx, 0) | eval total_increment = rx_increment + tx_increment | where total_increment > 0 | stats sum(rx_increment) as "RX Drop Increments", sum(tx_increment) as "TX Drop Increments", sum(total_increment) as "Total New Drops" by device_interface | sort - "Total New Drops" | head 15

index=main analyzer_type="interface" | eval device_interface = device_name + ":" + interface_name | sort 0 _time device_interface | streamstats current=f last(rx_drops) as prev_rx, last(tx_drops) as prev_tx by device_interface | eval rx_increment = coalesce(rx_drops - prev_rx, 0), tx_increment = coalesce(tx_drops - prev_tx, 0) | eval total_increment = rx_increment + tx_increment | where total_increment > 0 | stats latest(_time) as "Last Seen", sum(rx_increment) as "RX Drop Increments", sum(tx_increment) as "TX Drop Increments", sum(total_increment) as "Total New Drops", latest(rx_util) as "RX Util %", latest(tx_util) as "TX Util %" by device_name, interface_name | sort - "Total New Drops" | head 25 | eval "Last Seen" = strftime('Last Seen', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval "RX Util %" = if(isnull('RX Util %'), "N/A", round('RX Util %', 2) . "%") | eval "TX Util %" = if(isnull('TX Util %'), "N/A", round('TX Util %', 2) . "%")

panel.title: Top 5 Interfaces by Total Drop Counters

search.query: index=main analyzer_type="interface" | eval device_interface = device_name + ":" + interface_name | stats latest(_time) as "Last Updated", latest(rx_drops) as "RX Total Drops", latest(tx_drops) as "TX Total Drops" by device_name, interface_name | eval "Total Drops" = coalesce('RX Total Drops', 0) + coalesce('TX Total Drops', 0) | where 'Total Drops' > 0 | sort - "Total Drops" | head 5 | eval "Last Updated" = strftime('Last Updated', "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval "RX Total Drops" = if(isnull('RX Total Drops'), 0, 'RX Total Drops') | eval "TX Total Drops" = if(isnull('TX Total Drops'), 0, 'TX Total Drops') | table device_name, interface_name, "RX Total Drops", "TX Total Drops", "Total Drops", "Last Updated" | rename device_name as "Device", interface_name as "Interface"
